seoTitle: Marrickville vs Marsden Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marrickville and Marsden Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Marrickville vs Marsden Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marrickville and Marsden Park.
heading: Marrickville vs Marsden Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marrickville, New South Wales and Marsden Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marrickville has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Marsden Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marrickville or Marsden Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marrickville has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Marsden Park scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marrickville scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Marsden Park scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marrickville or Marsden Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marrickville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
